title: Keepalived VRRP and LVS load balancing

next_steps: Run query --live and confirm the MASTER director holds the configured VIP.
Add a BIND A record pointing at the VIP when exposing a service hostname.
Point nginx-waf or other upstream consumers at the VIP instead of individual node IPs.
Set access.nodes[].ip on director inventory sidecars from deploy/query output.
